title: Dad Yahir
html:
Yahir's biological father — alcoholism, recurring psychosis episodes, the "mi engaño" refrain, the Gtanos truck-business that wound down in 2019, and the lost-the-house-in-2008 backstory. The single most-referenced family figure in the corpus across the GP teen era (premonitions and dreams), the Austin / OSU college years (psychosis episodes Yahir comes home to), and the 2024 dad in bad state processing.

Through-line

Yahir's relationship to Dad is the source code for several first-class concepts in the vault: lineage as fate (am-I-cut-from-his-cloth), numbness as strength (the "physical block" that lets Yahir stay rational during crises), mom house by the river goal (insurance against being him), and mi engano (the deceived-by-her refrain). The narrative arc is teen rehearses his death → adult walks into the actual collapse → adult builds his life as a counter-prediction.

Chronological notes

  • 2019-Mar-27 — Mom relays that a Gtanos client's son died within a week of getting his license. The vehicular-death substrate is set.
  • 2019-Aug-25 — Premonition #1: "My dad dead 10:22 pm Augusta 24th ???". Title-as-content; timestamp = note timestamp.
  • 2019-Aug-26 — Next-day dream of dad's key + Native American certificates + $1000 bills — paternal-inheritance dream.
  • 2019-Sep-30 — Show dad all the documents note — real-world inheritance / paperwork prep.
  • 2019-Oct-27 — Premonition #2: "A car crash with dad happening." Mechanism named.
  • 2019-Oct-31 — Asks Maya where my father went wrong. Pre-grief retrospective.
  • 2019-Dec-22 — Premonition #3: "Dad dies it crashes tonight?" Form fully compressed.
  • 2021-Aug-24 — Jann people list places Dad in the canonical Emilio → Mom → Dad → Valeria nuclear-family ordering.
  • 2022-Oct-14/15 — The most documented Dad episode in the vault: Yahir surprises his family from OSU, finds Dad mid-psychosis, lola neglected, $500+ bills past due. Dad recants his lifelong "killed god" Nietzsche stance, kneels begging God to end his life. The dad papers — half-charred — reveal mi engaño traces back to Mom's 2008 infertility and a $40K fertility-treatment spend, the same year Dad lost the house.
  • 2024-Jan-03/04 — Most emotionally raw single note in the corpus: Yahir crying in the dark while reading A Little Life, processing Dad's collapse, Sam's incompatibility, Vic's death. The "I am cut from his cloth, his teachings will continue to my kids" line is the most explicit articulation of lineage as fate in the vault.

Source summaries

  • 2020 01 02 voice memo 0015 — New Year's time-capsule ("we'll see what's to come with your mom… is our life slipping away?")
  • 2020 02 08 voice memo 1422 — first white-hairs reflection prelude to Dad leaving
  • 2021 10 12 voice memo 1000 — beef-and-violence-with-dad confession (noisy transcript)
  • 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022 — most-documented Dad psychosis episode
  • 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state — most emotionally raw note in corpus

Recurring patterns

  • Premonition-as-form — three dated 2019 entries documenting Dad's death in present tense; cluster page at dad death premonitions.
  • Mi engaño — she deceived me refrain Yahir grew up with; traced in 2022 to Mom's infertility + the lost-house year. Concept at mi engano.
  • Killed-god Nietzsche stance — Dad's lifelong philosophical posture; recanted under suicidality in Oct 2022.
  • Burnt papers / pseudo-ritual fire — Dad's 2022 manifesto-burning in the backyard; partially salvaged into dad papers 2022.
  • Dad-as-mirror — Yahir's running anxiety about inheriting his trajectory; offset by building Mom her house as counter-prediction.

Open questions

  • Did the 2019 premonitions ever land? (Vault doesn't yet have a clean death-date for Dad — premonitions did not match 2019.)
  • The Jordan Cove line in Brenda 12 12 note — "unsustainable future fossil fuels" — was that note proximate to Dad's situation, or unrelated?
  • Where does the dad wisdom concept page sit relative to this entity? (Likely needs reconciliation on next densify — the wisdom lineage is teachings; this entity is the person.)

Connections

  • mom yahir · yahir family · emilio · maya · lola
  • dad death premonitions · dad papers 2022 · dad wisdom · mi engano
  • gtanos · grants pass or · grants pass teen era
  • lineage as fate · numbness as strength · mom house by the river goal · mom house by the river
  • 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022 · 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state
